Creates an application and marks it as submitted, creates a workflow, and creates a new loan.
Currently assumes the first available loan model available to make the loan with.

post.summary:
Attempts to determine the store location to which the user's application should be assigned.
If a valid store can be resolved with current information, this also updates the application and customer records as necessary.
This should be called (1) at application creation (2) at address entry and (3) at store selection, at minimum. (Auth policies: DefaultApplicationAccess)

requestBody.description: Contains user-specified information relevant to the request to resolve a store for the application

Searches for Customer based on email/username to begin the password reset process flow.
The guid token returned is to be used by all steps/pages throughout the process flow.

parameters.name: userNameOrEmail
parameters.description: The email or user name to search for.

get.summary:
For a given password reset guid token, provides the Vergent.Lms.Api.CustomerPortal.Domain.Models.PasswordRecoveryOptionsResponseModel
to determine which options (other than questions) are available to
reset a user's password.

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

get.summary: Gets random security question for customer.

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

post.summary: Validates an answer to identify verification question for a password reset

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

parameters.name: questionId

post.summary: Sends a pin via text message through Solutions By Text

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

post.summary:
Based on a reset token, will find the associated user/customer and
send them an email with a link to reset their password.  The link
will be comprised of the verificationPageUrl plus
a 'key' query string parameter with a guid string value.

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

requestBody.description: Verification page url to include in the email that will be sent

post.summary:
Updates a user's password.  The reset token must be valid and
the user's identity must have been verified via one of the available
processes (ie - question answers, email, text, etc)

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

get.summary:
Determines if the user associated to the reset token provided
has finished one of the idenity verification processes (ie -
question answers, email, text, etc).

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

get.summary:
Determines if the email guid token (from the link included in a password
reset email) is associated with a valid reset token and if so
marks the user as having finished the identity verification process
Verifies a pin entered by user during password reset.

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: Reset token that was recevied from M:Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Controllers.Customer.CustomerPasswordResetController.PasswordResetCustomerSearch(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

loanId.description: Gets or sets the loan identifier.

paymentId.description: Gets or sets the payment identifier.

amountDue.description: Gets or sets the amount due.

isInRescindPeriod.description: Gets or sets an indicator whether loan is in rescind period

authCode.description: Gets or sets the authentication code.

statusName.description: The name of the customer status

cardHolderName.description: Gets or sets the name of the card holder.

lastFourCardNumber.description: Gets or sets the last four card number.

expireMonth.description: Gets or sets the expire month.

expireYear.description: Gets or sets the expire year.

cardReference.description: Gets or sets the card reference.

isEligibleForDisbursement.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Card supports disbursement

success.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Models.CustomerCardResponseModel is success.

paymentId.description: Gets or sets the payment identifier.

token.description: The security token to use for future requests

Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Models..description: Represents a successful login attempt for the customer portal

isApproved.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Decision Engine response was approved.

isError.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether an error was encountered by the Decision Engine.

errorMessage.description: Gets or sets the error encountered by the decision engine.

portalTokenUrl.description: A url that a customer can use to access the most relevant page in customer portal

Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Models..description: Represents the response from the Application Initial Submission.

applicationId.description: Gets or sets the application public key

workflowId.description: The identity of the created workflow that will complete approval of the loan

loanHeaderId.description: The identity of the created loan

customerId.description: The identity of the customer that was produced by the applicant and is the subject of the loan

eSignUrl.description: A url that a customer can use to sign loan agreement documents

Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Models..description: Represents the result of an application submission
Data to support registering a mobile profile

isAutopay.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the loan should be set up on automatic payments

selectedStoreLocation.description: Gets or sets the store location newly selected in the store location selection step, or 0 if not selecting a location explicitly

appInfoStoreOverride.description: Gets or sets the application store override flag.

Vergent.Lms.Api.Website.External.Models..description: Represents a request to resolve a store location for an application and/or customer

oauth2.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"
oauth2.name: Authorization
